title: Buttery Juicy Vegan Injera Wrap
description: A kid-friendly Ethiopian dish featuring a vegan version of injera with added white wine vinegar for extra flavor and juiciness.
instructions: Mix flour and water to form a smooth batter. Add vegan white wine vinegar and salt, stirring well until no lumps remain.
Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Pour the batter onto the hot pan and spread evenly using a spatula to create circles.
Cook for about 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, prepare the filling by mixing tofu slices, finely chopped chickpeas, and salt in a bowl. Set aside.
As the injera is cooking, fill each circle with the prepared filling. Serve hot.
